feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Time dependant change Profit Center name
entry.content:
Hello

If we have

  • - Profit Center X valid from 01.01.2025 - 31.12.9999
  • - postings on it in 2025
  • - and now try to create a new valid period 01.01.2026 - 31.12.9999 and change the name to Y

the system blocks activation because the Profit Center would be "Deleted in 2025". But I just want to maintain the name for 2026 on - is there any way to do this of can't I modify it at all because it was created with valid to = 31.12.9999?

 

Thanks in advance. Kind Regards,

Hansi

entry.title: We are about to migrate the existing SAP ECC landscape to Suite On HANA, (RISE with SAP, Azure).
entry.content:
Since the application version and DB version will be migrated, therefore the SUM 1.1 DMO with System move method has been planned. 

Q. Is it must to have the source and the target application System IDs same?

The current system information as follows, 

  • SID : (Ex: ABC)
  • EHP Version : EHP06
  • Database Version : Oracle 12.1.0.2
  • OS : AIX 7.1

The target system details as follows,

  • SID : (Ex: XYZ)
  • EHP Version : EHP07
  • Database Version : HANA 2.0 SP05 
  • OS : SUSE linux 15

Thanks.

entry.title: Number of Vendors in a Shipment document in Transaction VT01N
entry.content:
How many vendors we can enter while creating a Shipment Document in VT01N?

 

Header Level

Item Level

Leg Level

entry.title: Croatia - Intrastat reporting - Consignment Pick up movements
entry.content:
Dear all,

In Croatia, all goods movments to EU countries should be reported to Intrastat. Does anyone know how to report goods movement from Consignment Pick Up process where there is no plant abroad. Initally goods are sent with Fill Up. Then we are able to create a Proforma Invoice and declare that but what can be done to bring pick ups appear in the report?

We are still on SAP ERP and use t-code /CCEE/HRFIM.

Thank you.

entry.title: MRP user exit/BAdI to filter BOM components by procurement type (only “F”)
entry.content:
I have an MRP requirement where I need to include a finished product in the planning run using MD61 and MD62. However, I want the BOM explosion to generate requirements only for components with procurement type F.

I cannot convert the E items into phantom assemblies because I use common technical BOMs shared with other finished products that must be planned normally.

Has anyone faced a similar scenario or implemented a BADI or user exit to handle this logic? The objective is that during the BOM explosion for MRP, only components with procurement type F external procurement are considered for planning.

entry.title: Olá Pessoal.....Alguém do módulo FSCD pra me ajudar nessa questão do IRPF na nova tabela de 2026.
entry.content: Depois de aplicar as 3 notas que a SAP indicou criou uma nova aba nas configurações via spro. Porém mesmo configurando não estamos conseguindo emitir documento o qual busca essa configuração. Ele sempre calcula pela tabela progressiva sem deduzir os valores novos de 2026. Algum consultor de FSCD conseguiu fazer isso dar certo ?

entry.title: Freight value Cumulation issue in MIRO against Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hi Experts! 

Freight cumulation for multiple goods receipts

While processing MIRO for Freight cost against Scheduling Agreement, single line is appearing instead of multiple as freight is accrued against multiple goods receipts. Reference documents also does not updated for freight cost in MIRO screen like it is updated in case of material purchase.

Freight value should be appeared in MIRO per Goods Receipt document with reference to material document.

Is there a way to reach this behavior?

Thank you.

Regards,

Tirath Nautiyal

***REMOVED BY MODERATION***

entry.title: UKM_CASE: rejected document still has the status "blocked" / how to deselect them?
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I have a question from our business. It happens, that credit documents are rejected in UKM_CASE. 

As our colleagues select by the status "blocked", they only expect to see the open documents, which needs to be released. You can only select be overall status, but not for the status, where the rejection is shown:

 

But as the rejected documents still have the "blocked"-status, too, they see these invalid entries in their result list:

My following question:

- is it correct that the rejected entries still have the status "blocked"?

- if yes, how to make them disappear (apart from filter in ALV grid)?

 

Thx chris

entry.title: SAP instance fails to start when SNC (Kerberos) is enabled
entry.content:
Hello

 when we try to start SAP, it does not come up

 SAP instance fails to start when SNC (Kerberos) is enabled – work processes abort during SNC initialization

System / Environment

SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP

OSS: Linux (RHEL 9)

Database: Oracle 19c

 SNC configured with Kerberos (MIT Kerberos, GSS-API)

 snc/gssapi_lib set to /usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so

 snc/identity/as configured with machine principal

 

 The SAP ABAP instance fails to start when SNC is enabled.

The startup stops during work process initialization.

 When SNC parameters are disabled, the SAP system starts successfully.

 

 

 Observed Behavior

 SAP instance startup proceeds normally:

 DIspatcher starts

 Database connection succeeds

 Work processes are spawned

 During work process startup, SNC initialization begins.

 

The SNC library is successfully loaded:

 SncInit(): found snc/gssapi_lib=/usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so

File "/usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so" dynamically loaded as GSS-API v2 library.

 Immediately after loading the GSS-API library, the work process terminates with signal 6 (SIGABRT).

 

This behavior repeats for multiple work processes, causing the instance to fail startup

 

 SncInit(): Initializing Secure Network Communication (SNC)

SncInit(): found snc/gssapi_lib=/usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so

File "/usr/lib64/libgssapi_krb5.so" dynamically loaded as GSS-API v2 library.

 

 /usr/lib64/libc.so.6(abort+0xd3)

...

/oracle/SID/19/lib/libclntsh.so.11.1(krb5int_key_register+0xb1)

/oracle/SID/19/lib/libclntsh.so.11.1(gss_krb5int_lib_init+0x29)

...

SncPDLInit()

SncInit()

ThSncInit()

ThInit()

abort()

 

 

 

System remains unavailable

 

Disabling SNC (snc/enable = 0) allows the system to start normally

 

 

 

 

Although SAP loads the configured GSS-API library successfully, the stack trace shows that Kerberos-related functions are being executed from the Oracle client library (libclntsh.so) at the time of the abort.

 

 

 QUESTIONS??

Why SAP work processes abort during SNC initialization after successfully loading the configured GSS-API library

 

How SAP expects SNC / Kerberos to behave when Oracle client libraries are present in the same process

 

Any known SAP Notes, restrictions, or supported configurations for:

 

SNC (Kerberos)

 

Oracle 19c client

 

Linux platforms

entry.title: When user trying to modify the credit limit system gives error that credit control area hastobereset
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While trying to modify the customer credit limit, we are getting the following error messages:

• Credit limit for control area CW01 is to be reset
• Customer credit limit 51715 for control area CW01 has been exceeded

Due to these errors, we are unable to modify the customer credit limit.

Could you please help us understand why this error occurs and how it can be resolved? Any guidance on relevant configuration, transactions, or programs would be greatly appreciated. This error is in SAP ECC.

Thanks in advance.



Regards,
Preksha Methari.

entry.title: How to activate OData API on SAP ECC R3
entry.content:
Hello SAP Specialists

We want to use API_ATTACHMENT_SRV on SAP ECC, but so far on our SAP ECC system no OData API has been activated or used so far. primary mode of interface so far are IDocs, files, BAPIs for this system.

Since OData API is to be activated which has never been done so far on this system, could you please help me with the pre-requisites?

SAP NetWeaver Gateway is available on the system, software component SAP_GWFND too is available on the system on the list of installed software.

 

Regards,

GP

entry.title: Exporting PIRs from MD62/MD63 to Exce
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I’m trying to export the PIRs from MD62/MD63 to an Excel file, but I haven’t found a way to do it yet. I have already tried using transaction MD79, but the issue is that it only allows exporting one material at a time. There’s no option to select multiple materials or an entire product family.

Is there a way to export all PIRs at once to Excel?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: How to prevent additional Planned Orders when stock covers >90% of requirements? (Dynamic Rounding)
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I am facing an issue with over-planning for semi-finished goods (HAL1).

[Current Situation]
When a production order is partially confirmed or "prepped" stock is slightly lower than the original planned quantity, MRP immediately generates a new small-quantity Planned Order to cover the minor deficit.
However, in our business process, if the available stock covers more than 90% of the requirement, we do not want to trigger additional production.

[Requirement]
I want to set a tolerance/threshold where MRP ignores deficits smaller than 10% of the total requirement.
• Example: If Requirement = 100 and Stock = 92 (8 deficit), No new Planned Order should be created.
• Example: If Requirement = 100 and Stock = 85 (15 deficit), Yes, a new Planned Order should be created.

entry.title: Where to find 3702420 - SAF-T Bulgaria: Collective Note (SAP ERP)
entry.content:
Hello

I am fairly new here and will appreciate some help if anyone knows.

Does anyone know when note 3702420 - SAF-T Bulgaria: Collective Note (SAP ERP) will be released or how one such as me to check the progress?

Can not find information on this note, while this note is mentioned as prerequisite for the other SAF T notes.

thanks

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Custom Tax Engine Integration and TDT Support in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private
entry.content:
1. Background Our client is a global enterprise operating in over 100 countries. We have developed a proprietary in-house Tax Engine.

  • B2C Business: Tax calculation is handled at the front-end sales system by calling the Tax Engine directly.

  • B2B Business: We plan to trigger the Tax Engine within SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition to complete tax calculations for Sales Orders (SO).

2. Key Concerns & Limitations The client is concerned that the standard SAP tax configuration may not support their complex global requirements due to:

  • a. Tax Code Constraints: Standard tax codes (2 characters) have a 1-to-1 mapping with tax types/rates. Managing validity periods at the tax code level is restrictive (validation issues), making it difficult to handle multi-tax/multi-rate scenarios across 100+ countries.

  • b. Granularity: Difficulty in accommodating highly granular tax management and business classification requirements.

3. Evaluated Integration Approaches

  • Approach A (External Suite Model): Similar to Thomson Reuters/ONESOURCE. Using custom programs to sync MM/SD/FI document data to the Tax Engine and returning results to SAP via dynamic condition records.

  • Approach B (India GST Model): Leveraging a framework similar to the 2017 India GST solution. We need SAP to detail this architecture and any potential business/product limitations.

4. Specific Questions on TDT (Time-Dependent Taxes) We understand that TDT is primarily available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

  • Does the Private Edition fully support TDT for all 100+ target countries?

  • Can TDT resolve the aforementioned limitations regarding tax code exhaustion and validity date validation in a global rollout?

5. Request for Guidance

  • Could SAP provide architectural best practices for integrating a 3rd-party tax engine in a Private Edition environment?

  • Which approach (A, B, or a modern API-based service like SAP BTP Tax Service) is recommended for a global enterprise of this scale?

entry.title: Does cal.sap.com run in SAP's corporate AWS acount?
entry.content:
Hi, We will be setting up a trial device on AWS, and our internal Security Team is asking if the website cal.sap.com is hosted in an AWS account. If so, they have requested SAP’s AWS account number. If it is not hosted in AWS, a simple confirmation of that will do.

Thank you!

entry.title: MD79 ISSUE "XXL has not been installed correctly!"
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing an issue when running transaction MD79 via Fiori.

When I execute MD79 in SAP GUI, it works correctly and the Excel export for PIRs is generated without any issue. However, when I run the same transaction via Fiori, I receive this error message during the export "XXL has not been installed correctly!"

Do you have any idea what could be causing this issue and how it can be resolved?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: SAP Gui does not installw without Excel
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can someone explain me why sometimes SAPGUI does not install if we don't have Excel ? The installation proceed with an error , and SAPGUI cannot be installed on a computer client.

I think it's due to SAPGUI front end installer who ask maybe to select an Excel dependencies but I am not sure .

 

Thank you in advance for your help

entry.title: Sequence in which QA10 transaction (RQEVAI30) picks the inspection lots for processing
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We came across an issue where the QA10 program which ran via batch job daily picked two inspection lots and posted UD however, it picked the latest inspection lot first and then the older one.

The scenario is like, 1st a manual inspection lot was created for material/batch to record results of some MICs however, the business entered wrong values and decided to create a new inspection lot for the same material/batch combination. Now, there are two inspection lots for material/batch but with two different values in MIC. Once the batch job for QA10 ran, it updated the batch characteristics from the 1st manual inspection lot. This created a panic within users, and they reached out to us.

Upon checking the logs in QA10L, it showed that - the QA10 program picked the 2nd lot first for posting UD and then the 1st lot. So, the value of MIC from 1st lot was updated in batch characteristics.

So, wanted to know how does the program picks lots for processing auto UD and is there a way to make it pick in sequence of lot creation.

Thanks a lot, in advance.

Best Regards,

Omm

entry.title: SAP Course Guidance as fresher MBA in SCM
entry.content:
Hi Community, I am fresher and completing my MBA in Supply chain management and joining FMCG company. 
Also I have access to SAP Student Learning Center. I want to know as a management student who is joining as executive in warehouse/DC which SAP courses should i do so that I have good learning .
Please guide me I am clueless which course to do.
